response.overview: The story follows an introspective protagonist as they wander through familiar streets, docks, and neighborhoods, observing the small, fleeting moments that make a life vivid: birds tracing their paths across the sky, children playing, gardens in bloom, and the mundane yet intimate rituals of ordinary people.
response.tagline: The Ocean moves slowly now, Not because it is lazy but because it remembers.
response.title: Before Tomorrow
